title: Section 1.1 — Project Setup & Infrastructure
summary: Detailed plan for Phase 1.1: installing dependencies, initializing Prisma/PostgreSQL, setting up NextAuth, creating layout shell and UI components.
notes: Superseded by ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md - uses Prisma/PostgreSQL/NextAuth stack which is now obsolete
key_points: Task 1.1.1: Install next-auth, date-fns, lucide-react, zod, react-hook-form, recharts
Task 1.1.2: Initialize Prisma with PostgreSQL, create 6 tables (Unit, Tenant, Lease, Payment, Expense, MaintenanceRequest)
Task 1.1.3: NextAuth with credentials provider, login page, middleware protection
Task 1.1.4: Dashboard layout shell with sidebar, header, responsive design
Task 1.1.5: 8 shared UI components (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Select, Modal, Table, EmptyState)
All tasks marked complete in summary checklist
